title: hieracium jurassiciforme subsp. succisellum
intro: Hieracium jurassiciforme subsp. succisellum is a lesser-known species of hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium jurassiciforme subsp. succisellum is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
